creator: bofh@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 232401
Mark DEPRECATED

devel/py-apns2 depends on https://github.com/python-hyper/hyper the development of which has been stalled. It's advisable to use https://github.com/Fatal1ty/aioapns which I have added in the tree devel/py-aioapns. So mark this DEPRECATED.
